query:
INSERT INTO spending_alerts (pubkey, monthly_limit_usd, alert_at_pct)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
               ON CONFLICT (pubkey) DO UPDATE
               SET monthly_limit_usd = EXCLUDED.monthly_limit_usd,
                   alert_at_pct = EXCLUDED.alert_at_pct,
                   updated_at = NOW()
